input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8367 [Automation] native-image run fails for com.sksamuel.hoplite:hoplite-core:3.0.0.RC1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Hoplite documentation says YAML, JSON, TOML, and HOCON file formats require optional hoplite-* parser modules, but those are not required to cover hoplite-core because Java properties parsing is built in.

Optional cloud/service preprocessors such as AWS, Azure, Consul, and Vault require separate modules and services; generated tests should avoid those unless intentionally testing optional integrations.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: hoplite-core has no required external service, Docker image, environment variable, or non-transitive dependency for meaningful coverage; core APIs can be exercised with MapPropertySource, system/property sources, and built-in .props parsing.
